form.formComment: Has ability but remains a maiden after 18 starts, the most recent effort a sixth (23.17) over 390m at this track. Expected to prove tough to beat.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (22.96) over 390m at Ballarat. Aided by a low draw but will need a little luck to feature.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 6th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 14 lengths (23.43) behind Paw Hailee in a Maiden on April 6. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.
